raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I made an online purchase of a dress on Macys.com using Macys credit card which is Citibank ( Order # XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) and received it on XX/XX/XXXX for the value of {$620.00}. The dress did not fit my body and immediately I packed it and shipped it back and expecting a refund. I tracked the dress shipment using the tracking number provided by XXXX - XXXX - The dress shipment was delivered to XXXX XXXX which is the seller on XX/XX/XXXX and signed for by XXXX XXXX employee " XXXX. '' Until today, I never received my refund for this returned item. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I made an online purchase of XXXX dresses on Macys.com using Macys credit card which is Citibank ( Order # XXXX and Order # XXXX for the same XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX ) thinking that the bigger sizes might be a better fit for me and received it on XX/XX/XXXX for the value of {$620.00} + {$620.00}. 
Both dresses did not fit my body and immediately I packed both dresses and shipped it back to the seller. I tracked the shipment and both dresses were delivered back to the seller. I received my refund of {$620.00} + {$620.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I started reaching out to Macys and XXXX XXXX inquiring about my refund but I could not reach any resolution. XXXX XXXX sent me a message back saying that " Due to insufficient balance on our payable balance with Macys, we can not issue a refund right now. '' On XX/XX/XXXX, I filed a dispute with Macys credit card Citibank concerning my un-refunded returned dress that was delivered back to the seller and received by the seller on XX/XX/XXXX. However, to my surprise, Citibank replied to me saying this dispute is already resolved because you already received your refund on XX/XX/XXXX for the amount of {$620.00}. 
I called them to explain that this is completely incorrect and the refund of {$620.00} + another {$620.00} is for two entirely different orders. I am still missing my refund of {$620.00} from order # XXXX which was delivered back to the seller on XX/XX/XXXX and I have the tracking information to prove that they received it. 

Until today XX/XX/XXXX, I have not received my refund of {$620.00} and no one is helping me with the resolution of this issue. I am desperate for help.
